description:
Create the clinical case in MDI after patient creation. The case is the unit of clinical work; our `cases` table is a **mirror** of MDI's truth, never the source.

**Scope**
- Drizzle schema: `src/lib/db/schema/cases.ts` — `id`, `user_id`, `mdi_case_id`, `status` (mirror), `primary_disease`, `condition_key`, `offering_ids` (array), `created_at`, `last_synced_at`, `mdi_updated_at`. PHI-adjacent: yes (the diagnosis is PHI), so reads are audited.
- `src/lib/mdi/cases.ts` — `createCase({ patientId, conditionKey, offerings, questions, diseases })` posts to `POST /partner/cases`.
- The intake answer payload (`case_questions`) is built from MDI's questionnaire schema. Our minimal intake (T-022) only captures the condition + state; **the deep clinical questionnaire happens in MDI's embedded UI** (T-061) — initial case creation may carry empty `case_questions`, with MDI's embedded form populating the rest.
- Primary disease ID required — fail-fast validation before the POST.
- `metadata: apoth_<our_case_internal_id>` for cross-reference.
- Audit log: `case.created_in_mdi`.

**Acceptance**
- A successful case create writes a `cases` row with `status = created` and `mdi_case_id` set; an audit row exists.
- A 4xx from MDI (e.g. missing primary disease) does not create a `cases` row; user sees a friendly error.
title: MDI case creation + cases mirror schema
